mnemonics.title: Bayes' Formula Order
mnemonics.content: Posterior = (Likelihood * Prior) / Evidence → PLz Pray Everyday

acronyms.usage: Remember MCMC methods in Bayesian computation

visualTips.visualization: Imagine Venn diagrams with overlapping regions representing joint probabilities

analogies.analogy: Like adjusting a recipe based on taste tests - each trial improves the next iteration
